code: import Lozenge from"@atlaskit/lozenge";import Button from"@atlaskit/button";import{ScopeTypeEnum}from"../../Contexts/AppContext";import LinkIcon from'@atlaskit/icon/glyph/link';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const ConnectRows=(unconnected,ConnectProjectPortfolio)=>{if(unconnected===undefined)return undefined;let rows=unconnected.map((item,index)=>({key:"".concat(item.id),isHighlighted:false,cells:[{key:item.name,content:item.name},{key:item.description,content:item.description},{key:item.description,content:item.type===ScopeTypeEnum.PROJECT?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Lozenge,{appearance:"inprogress",children:"Project"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Lozenge,{appearance:"new",children:"Portfolio"})},{key:'Add',content:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{iconBefore:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LinkIcon,{label:"Connect"}),appearance:"primary",onClick:()=>ConnectProjectPortfolio(item),children:"Connect"})}]}));return rows;};
